name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan represents a fundamental shift in the methodology. The old plan focused on a standard U-Net training pipeline, while the new plan introduces a cILC-based pre-processing step, a different loss function (Focal Loss, Pseudo-Cl, wavelet), and a specific ablation study (control model vs. full model). Because the data preparation, model architecture, and evaluation strategy have changed significantly, the previous execution steps cannot be reused. The entire pipeline must be re-implemented according to the new methodology.
